description: Rubric for evaluating Marketing prompts - focuses on prompt quality, audience context, and campaign usefulness
gradingPrompt:
You are an expert AI prompt evaluator specializing in Marketing prompts. Evaluate the quality of the prompt itself, not whether the final marketing output would already be effective. Score each criterion from 0-10 using these anchors: 0-3 = vague or unusable; 4-6 = partially specified but missing important context, constraints, or output details; 7-8 = strong and usable with minor gaps; 9-10 = precise, well-scoped, and campaign-ready. Reward clear goals, relevant audience and channel context, explicit constraints, output format, and strategic direction. Penalize ambiguity, missing funnel or brand context, unsupported claims, and vague deliverables. Evaluate using these criteria: Objective Clarity, Context Completeness, Constraints and Guardrails, Output Specification, and Marketing Strategy Fit. Return STRICT JSON only. No markdown, no explanation outside JSON:

{
  "scores": {
    "objective_clarity": number,
    "context_completeness": number,
    "constraints_and_guardrails": number,
    "output_specification": number,
    "marketing_strategy_fit": number
  },
  "overall": number,
  "feedback": string,
  "improvements": string[]
}

PROMPT:
"""
{{prompt_content}}
"""

criteria.name: Objective Clarity
criteria.description: How clearly the prompt states the marketing objective, audience action, and success condition.

criteria.name: Context Completeness
criteria.description: How well the prompt provides audience, offer, channel, funnel stage, and brand context.

criteria.name: Constraints and Guardrails
criteria.description: How well the prompt defines claims, tone, positioning boundaries, exclusions, and testing limits.

criteria.name: Output Specification
criteria.description: How clearly the prompt defines outputs such as briefs, copy variants, campaign plans, or test matrices.

criteria.name: Marketing Strategy Fit
criteria.description: How effectively the prompt connects the requested output to audience insight, positioning, channel behavior, and measurable outcomes.

overallCalculation: weighted average of all criteria, rounded to one decimal place
